auth.confirm_logout: Are you sure you want to log out?
chatbot.brand-color-description: This color is used on buttons to match your branding on the landing page, emails and webchat.
chatbot.default-language-description: Contacts are assigned the default language when the the contact language is unknown.
chatbot.default-reply-description: It is the default response that your chatbot will send to users when the chatbot doesn't know how to respond to the user message.
chatbot.delete-account-description: All your data associated to this chatbot will be deleted in 24 hours.
chatbot.development-mode-description: Your bot will work only for bot admins. Enable this option if you are building your bot and don't want non admins to use the bot.
chatbot.target-country-description: The country where most of your contacts live.
chatbot.timezone-description: Contacts are assigned this timezone when the the contact timezone is unknown.
chatbot.timezone-placeholder: Select a time zone for your contacts.
common.contactView: View email and phone of contacts
common.name: Name
contacts.create.title: Create new contact
logs.delete.dialog_first_desc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your
